subcodes.first_line: Your letter, which you sent in the name of this servant, hath reached the Wronged One and all thereof hath been heard [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ات که باسم عبد حاضر ارسال نمودی لدی المظلوم حاضر و تمام آن باصغا فائز
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @predictions and prophecies, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort
